full_text:
Guo Huai
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Huai. A jealous woman, she prevented her husband from seeing his first wife. Helped her daughter get a love match. Guo Huai was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
